title: Api access to apps framework
excerpt:
Make.com has an API to access its custom apps framework, where through a vs code extension you can create make.com apps. (Same with Integromat). 
Having the ability to directly edit JSON for workflow blocks, custom field…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Make.com has an API to access its custom apps framework, where through a vs code extension you can create make.com apps. (Same with Integromat).

Having the ability to directly edit JSON for workflow blocks, custom fields, and recipes from vs code while writing monday apps code would be lovely. Less switching around - having a tabbed interface and all. Plus being able to see the whole thing all at once vs having to open fields up to edit them would be much faster.

Consider this a long term goal of course.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @anon29275264 !

Thank you for the feedback!

I will add your vote to this feature request

Cheers,
Matias
